历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 8205, rising to about 6701 in 2024 (moving forward by about 1500), and sharply dropping to about 15749 in 2025 (moving backward by about 9048), with significant fluctuations; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 15749, the lowest in the past three years; the university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 12 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8, a reduction of 3 (-27.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large reduction that significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 48th on the 2026 Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the 44-53 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level national university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its education field (estimated master's applicants exceeding 15,000); overall Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (average), with medium short video exposure; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Education A+, Marxist Theory A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength among 211 universities, and strong appeal of normal flagship majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors shows differentiation and wait-and-see (2024), overall medium to high; the total number of candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 is about 238,000 (uncertain), a significant increase of about 3 times compared to the total of about 76,500 science and arts candidates in 2025, with notably intensified competition; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, a cross-province application; the university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Jilin) is about 17-18%, and in Xinjiang about 1.3%, a small-scale enrollment province, making ranking impact more sensitive to enrollment number fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of a significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, a 27.3% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and a roughly 3-fold surge in the number of candidates in Xinjiang, competitive pressure has notably increased; however, the university's somewhat positive reputation and strong disciplinary strength have some appeal for applications, and considering the additional competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is about 13473, with a range of 12973-13973.
